message:
feat(pipeline): add unified scan pipeline and pattern trigger benchmarks (ft-2oph2)

Adds scan_pipeline.rs orchestrating SIMD metrics, Aho-Corasick triggers,
and zstd compression in batch and chunked modes. Includes 21 unit tests,
17 proptests, and 7 Criterion benchmark groups for pattern_trigger throughput.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -340,6 +340,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "byte_compression"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "pattern_trigger"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
